lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਰਿ ॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: aap geaa dukh kattiaa har var paaeaa naar |47|
lines.english: Self-conceit is eliminated, and pain is eradicated; the soul bride obtains her Husband Lord. ||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿਆਰੀ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਸਾਚਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachiaaree sach sanchiaa saachau naam amol |
lines.english: The truthful ones gather Truth; the True Name is priceless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਇਨਾ ਰੁਪਾ ਸੰਚੀਐ ਧਨੁ ਕਾਚਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sueinaa rupaa sancheeai dhan kaachaa bikh chhaar |
lines.english: He hoards gold and silver, but this wealth is false and poisonous, nothing more than ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹੁ ਸਦਾਏ ਸੰਚਿ ਧਨੁ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saahu sadaae sanch dhan dubidhaa hoe khuaar |
lines.english: He calls himself a banker, gathering wealth, but he is ruined by his dual-mindedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨੁ ਮੀਤੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਤੂ ਹੰਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: saajan meet sujaan too too saravar too hans |
lines.english: You are my friend and companion, all-knowing Lord; You are the lake, and You are the swan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਾਇਲੁ ਊਜਲੋ ਪਤਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: har niramaaeil aoojalo pat saachee sach bol |
lines.english: The Lord is immaculate and pure; through Him, their honor is true, and their speech is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੀ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mamataa mohanee jin keetee so jaan |
lines.english: Know the One who created love and attachment to Maya, the Enticer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਉ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: saachau tthaakur man vasai hau balihaaree tis |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that being, whose mind is filled with the True Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥੪੮॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa amrit ek hai boojhai purakh sujaan |48|
lines.english: One who realizes the all-knowing Primal Lord, looks alike upon poison and nectar. ||48||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਮਾ ਵਿਹੂਣੇ ਖਪਿ ਗਏ ਖੂਹਣਿ ਲਖ ਅਸੰਖ ॥
lines.translit: khimaa vihoone khap ge khoohan lakh asankh |
lines.english: Without patience and forgiveness, countless hundreds of thousands have perished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਹਲੀ ਖਰਾ ਤੂ ਖਿਮਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਖ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad mahalee kharaa too khimaa sach sukh bhaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, enter the Mansion of the Lord's Presence; you shall be blessed with patience, forgiveness, truth and peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕਿਉ ਗਣੀ ਖਪਿ ਖਪਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਸੰਖ ॥
lines.translit: ganat na aavai kiau ganee khap khap mue bisankh |
lines.english: Their numbers cannot be counted; how could I count them? Bothered and bewildered, uncounted numbers have died.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਖੂਲੈ ਬੰਧੁ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khasam pachhaanai aapanaa khoolai bandh na paae |
lines.english: One who realizes his Lord and Master is set free, and not bound by chains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰਚੁ ਖਰਾ ਧਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਵਸਹਿ ਸਰੀਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kharach kharaa dhan dhiaan too aape vaseh sareer |
lines.english: Partake of the true wealth of meditation, and the Lord Himself shall abide within your body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਪੈ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਧੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mukh jaapai sadaa gun antar man dheer |
lines.english: With mind, body and mouth, chant His Glorious Virtues forever; courage and composure shall enter deep within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਖਪੈ ਖਪਾਇਸੀ ਬੀਜਉ ਵਥੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: haumai khapai khapaaeisee beejau vath vikaar |
lines.english: Through egotism, one is distracted and ruined; other than the Lord, all things are corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਅਲਗੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: jant upaae vich paaeian karataa alag apaar |49|
lines.english: Forming His creatures, He placed Himself within them; the Creator is unattached and infinite. ||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਪੈ ਕਉ ਈਸਰੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sanpai kau eesar dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: For wealth, some meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟੇ ਭੇਉ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: srisatte bheo na jaanai koe |
lines.english: No one knows the mystery of the Creator of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਾ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਨਿਹਚਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: srisattaa karai su nihchau hoe |
lines.english: Whatever the Creator of the World does, is certain to occur.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਪੈ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਚਾਲੈ ਹੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: sanpai saath na chaalai hor |
lines.english: Wealth does not go along with them when they die; it passes into the hands of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਪੈ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਚਾਕਰ ਚੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: sanpai kaaran chaakar chor |
lines.english: For the sake of wealth, some become servants or thieves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਪੈ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਲਿਖੇ ਕੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sanpai purab likhe kee paaeeai |
lines.english: By pre-ordained destiny, wealth is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇਰਤ ਹੇਰਤ ਹੇ ਸਖੀ ਹੋਇ ਰਹੀ ਹੈਰਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: herat herat he sakhee hoe rahee hairaan |
lines.english: Seeing and perceiving, O my companions, I am wonder-struck and amazed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਛੁਟੈ ਨਿਦਾਨਿ ॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: har ras peevai chhuttai nidaan |50|
lines.english: Drinking in the subtle essence of the Lord, one is emancipated in the end. ||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਨਹੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin saache nahee daragah maan |
lines.english: Without Truth, honor is not obtained in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤੀ ਮੈ ਮੁਈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਵੈ ਮਨਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau karatee mai muee sabad ravai man giaan |
lines.english: My egotism, which proclaimed itself in possessiveness and self-conceit, is dead. My mind chants the Word of the Shabad, and attains spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰ ਡੋਰ ਕੰਕਨ ਘਣੇ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਕੀ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: haar ddor kankan ghane kar thaakee seegaar |
lines.english: I am so tired of wearing all these necklaces, hair-ties and bracelets, and decorating myself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh paaeeai har siau preet piaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh attains the Lord, with love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਗਲ ਗੁਣਾ ਗਲਿ ਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mil preetam sukh paaeaa sagal gunaa gal haar |
lines.english: Meeting with my Beloved, I have found peace; now, I wear the necklace of total virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਮਨਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har bin kin sukh paaeaa dekhahu man beechaar |
lines.english: Without the Lord, who has found peace? Reflect upon this in your mind, and see.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪੜਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਝਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਖਹੁ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har parranaa har bujhanaa har siau rakhahu piaar |
lines.english: Read about the Lord, understand the Lord, and enshrine love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਮਿਟਈ ਹੇ ਸਖੀ ਜੋ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: lekh na mittee he sakhee jo likhiaa karataar |
lines.english: The inscription inscribed by the Creator Lord cannot be erased, O my companions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: har japeeai har dhiaaeeai har kaa naam adhaar |51|
lines.english: Chant the Lord's Name, and meditate on the Lord; hold tight to the Support of the Name of the Lord. ||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੇ ਹਥਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: karate hath vaddiaaeea boojhahu gur beechaar |
lines.english: Glorious greatness rests in the Hands of the Creator; reflect upon the Guru, and understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪਗੁ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aape kaaran jin keea kar kirapaa pag dhaar |
lines.english: He who created the universe, in His Mercy, installs His Feet within us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: nadar teree sukh paaeaa naanak sabad veechaar |
lines.english: By Your Glance of Grace, I have found peace; O Nanak, reflect upon the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਆ ਫੇਰਿ ਨ ਸਕੀਐ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੀ ਤਿਉ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: likhiaa fer na sakeeai jiau bhaavee tiau saar |
lines.english: This inscription cannot be challenged. As it pleases You, You care for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਹਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ji purakh nadar na aavee tis kaa kiaa kar kahiaa jaae |
lines.english: What can anyone say, about that Primal Lord, who cannot be seen?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭੂਲੇ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਉਬਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bhoole pach mue ubare gur beechaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are confused; they rot away and die. Only by reflecting upon the Guru can they be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਧਾ ਪੜਿਆ ਆਖੀਐ ਬਿਦਿਆ ਬਿਚਰੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paadhaa parriaa aakheeai bidiaa bicharai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: That Pandit, that religious scholar, is said to be well-educated, if he contemplates knowledge with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦਿਤਾ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur aapane jin hiradai ditaa dikhaae |52|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru, who has revealed Him to me, within my own heart. ||52||
